select_when: A team is drifting into needless complexity or shallow oversimplification instead of holding to the essential core of the problem.
People are boiling the ocean because they have not prioritized what actually matters.
Decision quality depends on disciplined simplicity that preserves causal structure without decorative complication.
Communication or planning is becoming dense enough to overload working memory and hide the real decision.
avoid_when: The push for simplicity would erase decision-critical nuance, edge cases, or causal structure.
Complexity-bias-resistance is being misused as a slogan for crude reduction rather than disciplined prioritization.

curation_notes.summary: Focused on resisting needless intricacy while protecting the causal core from lazy oversimplification.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader communication-framework sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on essential-core discipline.
open_questions: The source overlaps with teaching and presentation design, but the operational file stays on complexity management in reasoning and planning.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit on unnecessary intricacy, oversimplification risk, boiling the ocean, and prioritizing the essential core.

avoid_when.note: The source explicitly warns against simplification that destroys necessary nuance or structure.

input_type.note: The typed input label compresses the raw complexity-fog activation conditions.

output_type.note: The output label keeps the intervention on disciplined simplification rather than mere brevity.

reasoning_types.note: The model relies on reflective pruning and diagnostic focus on what matters.
